data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. THE GOLDEN GHOST was in the money at Hoosier Park two runs ago before finishing seventh at his latest appearance over 1609m at this track, beaten 35 metres. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Has the talent to find the winners' list. 1. ROCKIN PIPPA is on the radar after his last-start sixth over 1609m at Miami Valley Raceway two weeks ago. 5. SMOKE ON THE WATER ended last prep with a eighth at this track over 1609m five months ago. Can open this campaign with a more positive effort.","runners":[3,1,5],"exclusive":false}
